general.description: General purpose prompts for common development tasks

prompts.name: Commit
prompts.description: Execute the mandatory commit procedure with all required pre-commit checks

prompts.name: Fix
prompts.description: Unified helper for fixing quality issues, test failures, or documentation sync. Accepts target parameter: quality | tests | docs

prompts.name: Review
prompts.description: Comprehensive code review to find bugs, inconsistencies, and incomplete implementations

prompts.name: Do
prompts.description: Read the roadmap, identify the next pending step, and implement it completely

prompts.name: Explore
prompts.description: Brainstorm approaches before committing to a plan. Produces an ephemeral decision log without creating formal plan or roadmap entries.

prompts.name: Plan
prompts.description: Create a development plan based on user description, add it to plans directory, and update roadmap

prompts.name: Analyze
prompts.description: End-of-session analysis: check all (context effectiveness and session optimization). Single entry point replacing analyze-context-effectiveness and analyze-session-optimization.

prompts.name: Post-Prompt Hook
prompts.description: Lightweight post-prompt self-improvement hook that runs analysis Steps 4–9 and emits Skills, Plans, or Rules as needed

prompts.name: Ingest
prompts.description: Ingest external sources into the memory bank, synthesize key takeaways, update related pages, and log contradictions

prompts.name: Init Wiki
prompts.description: Seed .cortex/wiki from existing project docs, run ingest snapshots, write categorized wiki pages, and rebuild index.md

prompts.name: Ask
prompts.description: Answer project questions from .cortex/wiki using index.md, read 3–5 relevant pages, cite sources, optionally file confirmed synthesis as a new page
